g.onclick: sendPrompt('What should the Customer menu include — categories, prices, images?')
sendPrompt('What details does the Customer menu show — dish name, price, description?')
sendPrompt('What is the Admin role responsible for in this restaurant system?')
sendPrompt('What screens and actions does the Cook role have access to?')
sendPrompt('What screens and actions does the Waiter role have access to?')
sendPrompt('What does the History of food feature show — past orders, logs?')
sendPrompt('What is the Staff role in this system and how do they interact with orders?')
sendPrompt('How does Staff manage orders across new, pending, and done states?')
sendPrompt('How does the Bills feature work — generate, print, or pay?')
sendPrompt('What does the Staff Info screen show — attendance, present and absent status?')
sendPrompt('What table and floor information does Staff see?')
sendPrompt('How does Staff place new orders — scan QR, select table, add items?')
sendPrompt('What does the Kitchen screen look like and how does it update in real-time?')
sendPrompt('How are new orders displayed and alerted in the kitchen?')
sendPrompt('How does the kitchen mark and manage pending orders?')
sendPrompt('What happens after the kitchen marks an order as done — does Staff get notified?')
sendPrompt('What order details does Kitchen see — table number, floor, special notes?')
